description: Left off-canvas section navigation panel showing a section heading and multi-level navigation tree for the current site section.
selectorsCovered: .region-left_off_canvas .section-navigation .paragraph--type--para-section-nav > nav > ul > li > ul > li > ul
.region-left_off_canvas .section-navigation .paragraph--type--para-section-nav > nav > ul > li > ul > li > ul > li

props.name: items
props.type: Array<{ label: string; href?: string; children?: Array<{ label: string; href?: string; children?: Array<{ label: string; href?: string }> }> }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Off-canvas section navigation with a two-level menu

stories.name: Support
stories.description: Off-canvas section navigation for a support section with fewer levels

notes: The section navigation root div also carries a Drupal js-view-dom-id-* class but this varies per-render and should not be reproduced as a prop. The nav element uses class 'desktop-section-navigation'. The section title h4 uses class 'off-canv'. The Drupal wrapper classes (views-field, field-content, block, paragraph--type--para-section-nav, paragraph--view-mode--default) must be reproduced verbatim in the JSX. Links may optionally have class 'uoslink'.
